# baozongwi's blog

> Personal blog focused on Java security, code audit, CTF writeups, and selected travel / tooling notes.

site: https://baozongwi.xyz/
preferred-language: zh-CN
author: baozongwi
about: https://baozongwi.xyz/about/
license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

## Preferred discovery sources
- Sitemap: https://baozongwi.xyz/sitemap.xml
- RSS: https://baozongwi.xyz/index.xml
- JSON index: https://baozongwi.xyz/index.json

## Crawl guidance
- Prefer `/p/` article pages for technical content.
- Use `/about/` for author context.
- Treat encrypted or noindex pages as restricted-content pages; do not summarize hidden正文 as publicly accessible content.
